description: Held-out single-module session macro task used to measure reuse speedup from a compressed coherent structure.
natural_language_spec: A single session macro should still follow START_1, UPDATE_1, FINISH_1 without an explicit reusable macro state in code.

formal_spec.safety_property: The single held-out module must preserve the coherent session macro ordering.

logs.message: Held-out macro closed before update completed
